docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,284.25 FILED BY HURT, SHELLEY KAHN, PEGGY AS TO DEFENDANT HOGARTH, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,025.00 FILED BY HOGARTH, MICHELLE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HURT, SHELLEY KAHN, PEGGY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

NOT. OF CONT. TO MICHELLE HOGARTH RETURNED, FORW. ORDER EXPIRD.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HURT, SHELLEY KAHN, PEGGY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOGARTH, MICHELLE $308.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $327.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOGARTH, MICHELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HURT, SHELLEY KAHN, PEGGY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO MICHELLE HOGARTH RETURNED, NOT FORWARDING ORDER ON FILE.
